title: ALICE//REBOOT E01 右綴じネーム計画

characterBible.visualContinuity: Japanese commercial sci-fi manga, clean confident ink, cinematic screentone, readable silhouettes. Never redesign costumes, hair, eye color, age, or body proportions between panels. Battle damage persists chronologically.

アリス・キサラギ（現在）.face: sharp oval face, straight brows, small scar through left eyebrow
アリス・キサラギ（現在）.hair: short choppy silver-gray bob, long right fringe
アリス・キサラギ（現在）.eyes: blue-gray; glow electric blue only during neural synchronization
アリス・キサラギ（現在）.costume: black cropped courier jacket with white piping, charcoal fitted cargo pants, utility pouch on left hip, heavy ankle boots
アリス・キサラギ（現在）.acting: dry humor, guarded posture; pain and fear shown through clenched jaw before anger
アリス・キサラギ（現在）.continuity: back wound and torn jacket begin in the lower-hangar drone attack; afterward keep bandage and tear visible

少女アリス（8年前）.face: same bone structure and left-eyebrow scar as adult Alice, softer cheeks
少女アリス（8年前）.hair: silver-gray chin-length bob floating inside helmet
少女アリス（8年前）.costume: white-and-navy neural pilot suit, transparent bubble helmet, blood running from right forehead in cold open

ミラ.form: blue translucent hologram projected from seamless palm-sized black cube
ミラ.hair: very long cobalt-blue hair drifting as if underwater
ミラ.costume: simple sleeveless white knee-length dress, bare feet
ミラ.acting: minimal expression; tiny head tilts and delayed concern carry emotion
ミラ.rule: never physically touches objects; projection may glitch under load

カイン・レイヴン.eyes: left eye dark gray, right eye mechanical red with concentric iris
カイン・レイヴン.costume: matte-black long-coat powered armor with high collar, red AEGIS insignia, particle-sword device at right hip
カイン・レイヴン.continuity: right cyber-eye sparks and later flickers after Alice punches it on the train

シドウ博士.face: deep lines, rectangular glasses, gray stubble
シドウ博士.costume: blood-stained off-white lab coat over dark turtleneck
シドウ博士.continuity: abdominal wound always pressed with left hand

ゲン.costume: orange GEN EXPRESS work shirt, rolled sleeves, headset
ゲン.appearanceRule: communication scenes use a small inset video only when desired; otherwise voice remains off-panel

WHITE RABBIT.silhouette: rounded white armor, narrow waist, two long rabbit-ear sensor fins
WHITE RABBIT.details: cyan eyes and seams, damaged left chest with old blackened crater; right arm lost in cold open, restored but weathered in present until newly blasted
WHITE RABBIT.movement: humanlike and unnervingly fast, blue particle dagger and hexagonal shield

RED QUEEN.build: slender, same facial geometry as Alice
RED QUEEN.hair: long saturated crimson hair floating in culture fluid
RED QUEEN.acting: newborn stillness turning into an intimate predatory smile
RED QUEEN.rule: visually echo Alice but never copy her silver hair or blue palette

AEGIS総裁.silhouette: tall seated woman behind translucent white veil, waist-length dark hair
AEGIS総裁.costume: architectural white gown with black collar
AEGIS総裁.acting: absolute stillness and precise hand gestures
AEGIS総裁.rule: do not reveal facial features in episode 1

AEGIS兵.costume: identical matte-black full helmets and segmented tactical armor, red visor slit

獣型兵器.form: four-legged black armored drone twice WHITE RABBIT's mass
獣型兵器.details: single red eye, missile rack spine, cannon mouth, blade forelegs
獣型兵器.rule: keep quadruped anatomy readable in every action panel
